This set comes with 4 drill bits, each with a shank size of 3/8" that can be used with a reverse driver variable speed drill to extract damaged screws. They are constructed of stainless steel and have 63-65 bit hardness. They come in 4 assorted sizes - 1 through 4.

These are very simple to use. First you need to locate a threaded or damaged crew head, and then with the drill in reverse drive, use side 1 to create a smooth cavity within the damaged head. Fine gold recovery suction bottles from ASR Outdoor are an essential gold mining tool to include with gold panning kits or gold prospecting equipment. Ideal when working with fine gold flour, flakes or very small gold nuggets, they are made from high quality, squeezable plastic that resists wear and cracking. Plus, due to their lightweight design, they’re easy to pack and carry with your gold panning equipment.

The collection bottles are designed for use during gold panning cleanup, concentrate separation or suctioning fine gold from gold pans, dredge or sluice box matting. When gold panning, especially in the final stages of separating gold from black sand, gold particles can be too small to pick out by hand; the collection bottle allows the prospector to easily suction up fine particles, without disturbing surrounding material, and without taking up too much excessive sand or silt in the process.

These fine gold recovery collection bottles are easy to use: After gold is panned down to very fine sediment or concentrates, the prospector visually identifies flakes of gold in their pan or matting. Then, use the suction bottle by placing the tip near the gold and gently squeeze; upon release of the squeeze of the bottle, the suction created pulls the gold into the bottle for safe keeping. Secure fitting nozzle ensures safe storage and transport of collected gold or other precious metals.

These ASR Outdoor fine gold recovery collection bottles are vital for recovering small quantities of gold that may otherwise be lost, especially for amateur and small scale prospectors where every grain counts. Assorted pack sizes available.

Tenacious Tape comes in black, clear and many popular colors, so you can match your fabric for nearly invisible repairs. 

Instructions for use: 

Clean & dry area to be prepared, trim loose threads. Join torn edges of material. Cut tape to appropriate size, overlap repair by 25mm in all directions. Round edges of tape. Remove paper backing and apply tape to damaged area. Tape may be applied to outside surface or inside surface. After applying, rub tape with pressure using circular motion from center out. Item may be used immediately. Adhesive reaches full strength in 24hrs.

before_html:
Test and evaluate precious metals with confidence using this gold testing kit designed for simple, chemical free identification. Built around a traditional touchstone testing method, this metal tester allows you to quickly compare metal samples and determine relative purity, without the need for acids or complicated procedures. ToolTreaux's precious metal tester includes 999 (silver), 10k gold, 14k gold and 18k gold testing options.

To use, simply draw your item across a touchstone to create a visible mark, then select the corresponding tester point and compare the results side by side. Matching streaks indicate similar metal composition, while differences can help identify variations in karat or alloy content. This straightforward process makes it easy for both beginners and experienced users to assess gold and silver content. To further testing accuracy, use acid testing solutions that correspond to the metal being tested (not included).

Crafted from durable metal with clearly stamped reference markings, this tester is designed for consistent, repeatable performance. Its compact size makes it easy to carry in a pocket, tool kit or field bag, making it ideal for jewelers, prospectors, collectors or anyone working with precious metals. Testing stone or touchstone is not included. See below for silver and gold testing instructions.
